# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prebuild
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - cleanup

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR: "ci-scripts"
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "build.sh"
  TEST_SCRIPT: "test.sh"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "deploy.sh"
  PREBUILD_SCRIPT: "prebuild.sh"
  CLEANUP_SCRIPT: "cleanup.sh"
  ENABLE_PREBUILD: "true"
  ENABLE_BUILD: "true"
  ENABLE_TEST: "true"
  ENABLE_DEPLOY: "false"
  ENABLE_CLEANUP: "true"
  SCRIPT_TIMEOUT: "3600"
  BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: "production"

.custom_script_template: &custom_script_template
  tags:
    - shared
  retry:
    max: 2
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure
  timeout: ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT}s
  before_script:
    - echo "Starting ${CI_JOB_NAME} on ${CI_RUNNER_DESCRIPTION}"
    - echo "Job ID: ${CI_JOB_ID}, Pipeline ID: ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - logs/
      - reports/
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: always
  cache:
    key: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_JOB_NAME}
    paths:
      - .cache/
      - node_modules/
      - vendor/
      - .npm/
      - .pip/
      - .gradle/
    policy: pull-push

prebuild:
  <<: *custom_script_template
  stage: prebuild
  script:
    - |
      if [ "${ENABLE_PREBUILD}" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Executing prebuild script..."
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PREBUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
          bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PREBUILD_SCRIPT}
        else
          echo "No prebuild script found at ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PREBUILD_SCRIPT}"
          echo "Skipping prebuild stage"
        fi
      else
        echo "Prebuild stage disabled"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PREBUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

build:custom:
  <<: *custom_script_template
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ "${ENABLE_BUILD}" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script..."
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
          bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}
        else
          echo "ERROR: Build script not found at ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
          exit 1
        fi
      else
        echo "Build stage disabled"
      fi
  needs:
    - job: prebuild
      optional: true
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_BUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

test:custom:
  <<: *custom_script_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ "${ENABLE_TEST}" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script..."
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${TEST_SCRIPT}" ]; then
          bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${TEST_SCRIPT}
        else
          echo "WARNING: Test script not found at ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${TEST_SCRIPT}"
          echo "Skipping test stage"
        fi
      else
        echo "Test stage disabled"
      fi
  coverage: '/Coverage: \d+\.\d+%/'
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: reports/junit.xml
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: reports/coverage.xml
  needs:
    - job: build:custom
      optional: true
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

deploy:custom:
  <<: *custom_script_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ "${ENABLE_DEPLOY}" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deploy script..."
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" ]; then
          bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}
        else
          echo "ERROR: Deploy script not found at ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
          exit 1
        fi
      else
        echo "Deploy stage disabled"
      fi
  environment:
    name: ${BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}
    on_stop: cleanup:custom
  needs:
    - job: test:custom
      optional: true
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true"'
      when: manual
    - when: never

cleanup:custom:
  <<: *custom_script_template
  stage: cleanup
  script:
    - |
      if [ "${ENABLE_CLEANUP}" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom cleanup script..."
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CLEANUP_SCRIPT}" ]; then
          bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CLEANUP_SCRIPT}
        else
          echo "No cleanup script found at ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CLEANUP_SCRIPT}"
          echo "Skipping cleanup stage"
        fi
      else
        echo "Cleanup stage disabled"
      fi
  environment:
    name: ${BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}
    action: stop
  when: manual
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_CLEANUP == "true"'
      when: manual
    - when: never

build:parallel:
  <<: *custom_script_template
  stage: build
  parallel:
    matrix:
      - BUILD_TYPE: [debug, release]
        PLATFORM: [linux, windows, macos]
  script:
    - |
      echo "Building ${BUILD_TYPE} for ${PLATFORM}"
      PARALLEL_BUILD_SCRIPT="${BUILD_TYPE}_${PLATFORM}_build.sh"
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PARALLEL_BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PARALLEL_BUILD_SCRIPT}
      else
        echo "No specific build script for ${BUILD_TYPE}/${PLATFORM}"
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
          bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}
        fi
      fi
  needs:
    - job: prebuild
      optional: true
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: never
    - if: '$ENABLE_PARALLEL_BUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

docker:build:
  <<: *custom_script_template
  stage: build
  image: docker:latest
  services:
    - docker:dind
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/docker-build.sh" ]; then
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/docker-build.sh
      elif [ -f "Dockerfile" ]; then
        docker build -t ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} .
      else
        echo "No Docker build script or Dockerfile found"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DOCKER_BUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

custom:hook:
  <<: *custom_script_template
  stage: .pre
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/pre-pipeline-hook.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing pre-pipeline hook..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/pre-pipeline-hook.sh
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PRE_HOOK == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

custom:post:
  <<: *custom_script_template
  stage: .post
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/post-pipeline-hook.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing post-pipeline hook..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/post-pipeline-hook.sh
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_POST_HOOK == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never
